prose.en: Employ the following measures to facilitate an individual’s awareness that personally identifiable information is being collected by {param:sc-42.04_odp.02}: {param:sc-42.04_odp.01}.

guidance.en: Awareness that organizational sensors are collecting data enables individuals to more effectively engage in managing their privacy. Measures can include conventional written notices and sensor configurations that make individuals directly or indirectly aware through other devices that the sensor is collecting information. The usability and efficacy of the notice are important considerations.

prose.en: {param:sc-42.04_odp.01} are employed to facilitate an individual’s awareness that personally identifiable information is being collected by {param:sc-42.04_odp.02}

organizational personnel responsible for sensor capabilities
Mechanisms supporting and/or implementing measures to facilitate an individual’s awareness that personally identifiable information is being collected by sensors
sensor information collection capabilities for the system

guidelines.en: measures to facilitate an individual’s awareness that personally identifiable information is being collected are defined;
sensors that collect personally identifiable information are defined;
